productDisplayName: Royal Diadem Red Earring & Pendant Set
description: Style NoteInspired from India's rich jewel history, this set of earrings and chain from royal diadem is sure to become a love-forever statement piece in your jewellery box. Style this with matching ethnic suits or saris or wear it with a monochrome ensemble for an interesting fusion vibe. This piece is guaranteed to give your look an instant boho edge (if it's a Western outfit) or a refined polish (if paired with ethnic wear)Product DetailsInverted umbrella shaped dangler with colourful stone embellishmentsHas red beads above the danglerHas a push back closureRed beaded chain with conical shaped embellishment at the centre with pearl like beads and colourful stonesHas an adjustable  hook closure  Material and CareGold plated metalWipe with a cotton swab to remove dustSizeLength: 9 cm Style NoteInspired from India's rich jewel history, this set of earrings and chain from Royal Diadem is sure to become a love-forever statement piece in your jewellery box.
